title: Trying to create a MODEL CAR with invalid data types
gherkin:
When the user tries to create a "MODEL CAR" with the following data
  | key          | value |
  | name         | true  |
  | product_code | true  |
  | release_year | true  |
  | scale        | true  |
  | series       | true  |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
